channel.title: PAL Portals - Blog
channel.description: Stay updated with the latest insights on AI, automation, and digital transformation

item.title: Social Media Terms: A Comprehensive Glossary
item.description: With clear definitions and helpful examples, social media terms glossary has everything you need to know to succeed on social media.
item.author: Priti Bhavsar

image.title: Social Media Terms: A Comprehensive Glossary

item.title: Social Algorithms Explained: How They Work and Why They Matter
item.description: Understanding social media algorithms is crucial for optimizing content visibility and engagement on various platforms.
item.author: Priti B
